# YourHRCoach.ai

> AI-Powered HR Guidance for Small Business — built on Dr. Steve Cohen's 40+ years of HR consulting expertise.

## What is YourHRCoach.ai?

YourHRCoach.ai is an AI HR coaching platform designed for small business owners who need expert HR guidance without the cost of a full-time HR department or expensive retainer-based consulting. Every answer draws from Dr. Steve Cohen's 40+ years of real-world HR experience.

## Core Features

- **Instant HR Answers 24/7**: Ask any HR question — terminations, harassment complaints, performance issues, onboarding — and get expert guidance instantly.
- **Document Generation**: Create termination letters, written warnings, job descriptions, offer letters, HR policies, and performance reviews — downloadable as Word documents.
- **Upload & Review Documents**: Upload existing HR documents for expert feedback, rewrites, and improvements.
- **Conversation History**: All conversations saved and searchable.
- **Private & Secure**: Conversations are private to each account.

## Pricing

- Monthly: $99/month (after 7-day free trial)
- Annual: $997/year (save $191 — 2 months free)
- 7-day free trial on all plans

## About the Expert

Dr. Steve Cohen is the founder of HR Solutions On Call and has over 40 years of experience in HR consulting, helping organizations from 2 to 17,000 employees navigate complex HR situations. He has authored 150+ articles, chapters, and presentations on HR management topics.
